name: medidor-ph
description: Medidor de pH - sensor quimico escolar digital

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run preview --prefix frontend"
